recipes.name: Mauritian Fish Vindaye
recipes.instructions: Lightly fry fish and set aside. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, turmeric, garlic, ginger, onions, chili, and vinegar. Add fish and coat well. Simmer briefly.

recipes.name: Mauritian Mine Frire
recipes.instructions: Stir-fry chicken, then garlic and ginger. Add veggies. Add noodles and soy sauce. Toss on high heat with scrambled egg.

recipes.name: Chinese Mapo Tofu
recipes.instructions: Cook beef with garlic and ginger. Add paste, soy sauce, tofu, and water. Simmer and finish with spring onions.

recipes.name: Chinese Chow Mein
recipes.instructions: Stir-fry chicken, add vegetables, garlic, sauces, and noodles. Toss until coated.

recipes.name: Japanese Chicken Katsu
recipes.instructions: Bread chicken with flour, egg, panko. Fry until golden. Serve with tonkatsu sauce.

recipes.name: Japanese Yakisoba
recipes.instructions: Stir-fry pork, add vegetables, then noodles. Add sauces and toss well.

recipes.name: Italian Carbonara
recipes.instructions: Cook bacon. Mix eggs and cheese. Combine hot pasta with bacon fat and egg mixture. Season with pepper.

recipes.name: Italian Margherita Pizza
recipes.instructions: Spread sauce, add cheese. Bake at high heat. Finish with basil and oil.

recipes.name: Fast Food Chicken Wrap
recipes.instructions: Cook chicken with salt and pepper. Assemble tortilla with all ingredients and wrap.

recipes.name: Fast Food Fried Rice Bowl
recipes.instructions: Scramble egg, cook chicken, add rice, sauces, and veggies. Mix on high heat and finish with green onions.

recipes.name: Mauritian Chicken Briani
recipes.instructions: Layer marinated chicken with rice and potatoes; cook on low until fragrant.

recipes.name: Mauritian Octopus Curry
recipes.instructions: Simmer octopus then cook with spices and tomatoes.

recipes.name: Mauritian Dal Fry
recipes.instructions: Boil dal then temper spices and mix.

recipes.name: Mauritian Gateau Piment
recipes.instructions: Blend mixture, form balls, and deep fry.

recipes.name: Mauritian Fish Daube
recipes.instructions: Simmer fish with tomato sauce and spices.

recipes.name: Mauritian Roti Cari Pois
recipes.instructions: Prepare roti; cook peas with spices.

recipes.name: Mauritian Fried Noodles
recipes.instructions: Stir-fry all together on high heat.

recipes.name: Mauritian Seafood Vindaye
recipes.instructions: Cook seafood then coat in hot spiced mustard sauce.

recipes.name: Mauritian Pulao
recipes.instructions: Water

recipes.name: Mauritian Chicken Soup
recipes.instructions: Simmer everything until broth forms.

recipes.name: Chinese Kung Pao Chicken
recipes.instructions: Stir-fry all until sauce thickens.

recipes.name: Chinese Beef Chow Fun
recipes.instructions: Stir-fry on high heat for char.

recipes.name: Chinese Eggplant Stir-Fry
recipes.instructions: Cook eggplant soft then coat with sauce.

recipes.name: Chinese Hot & Sour Soup
recipes.instructions: Salt

recipes.name: Chinese Lemon Chicken
recipes.instructions: Fry chicken then coat in lemon sauce.

recipes.name: Chinese Char Siu
recipes.instructions: Marinate pork and roast.

recipes.name: Japanese Gyudon
recipes.instructions: Simmer beef and onions in sauce; serve over rice.

recipes.name: Japanese Oyakodon
recipes.instructions: Simmer chicken, then add eggs.

recipes.name: Japanese Curry Rice
recipes.instructions: Simmer everything until thick.

recipes.name: Japanese Salmon Don
recipes.instructions: Serve seared salmon over rice with toppings.

recipes.name: Japanese Katsudon
recipes.instructions: Simmer sauce, add cutlet and egg.

recipes.name: Japanese Udon Stir Fry
recipes.instructions: Stir-fry everything.

recipes.name: Italian Penne Arrabiata
recipes.instructions: Simmer sauce and mix with pasta.

recipes.name: Italian Alfredo Pasta
recipes.instructions: Cook creamy sauce and mix.

recipes.name: Italian Mushroom Risotto
recipes.instructions: Stir constantly while adding stock.

recipes.name: Fast Food Beef Burger
recipes.instructions: Assemble cooked patties.

recipes.name: Fast Food Chicken Pasta
recipes.instructions: Mix creamy chicken sauce with pasta.

recipes.name: Fast Food Fried Rice
recipes.instructions: Stir-fry on high heat.

recipes.name: Fast Food Burrito
recipes.instructions: Wrap all ingredients.

recipes.name: Fast Food Chicken Quesadilla
recipes.instructions: Grill until cheese melts.

recipes.name: Fast Food Veggie Wrap
recipes.instructions: Assemble and wrap.

recipes.name: Sandwich with Jam Butter and Cheddar
Motto Hazelnut
recipes.instructions: Open Motto biscuits, spread hazelnut filling if needed, sandwich and serve.

recipes.name: Dholl Puri
recipes.instructions: Soak split peas 4 hours, drain and grind to paste with turmeric and cumin. Make dough with flour and water, rest 30 min. Roll dough thin, spread pea paste, fold and roll again. Cook on hot griddle with oil until golden both sides.

recipes.name: Rougaille Saucisse
recipes.instructions: Slice sausages and brown in oil. Add chopped onions, garlic, ginger and cook until soft. Add diced tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt and pepper. Simmer 20 minutes until sauce thickens. Serve with rice or bread.

recipes.name: Mine Frit
recipes.instructions: Boil noodles, drain. Stir-fry chicken and Vegetable with garlic, ginger in hot oil. Add noodles, soy sauce, salt, pepper. Toss until well mixed and slightly crispy. Garnish with scallions.

recipes.name: Vindaye Poisson
recipes.instructions: Fry fish pieces until golden, set aside. Toast mustard seeds, add curry powder, turmeric. Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft. Add vinegar, water, Bay leaf, dried, thyme, salt, chili. Simmer 10 minutes, add fish, simmer 5 more minutes.

recipes.name: Briani
recipes.instructions: Marinate chicken with yogurt, half the spices, salt. Fry onions until golden, remove half. Add chicken, cook 10 min. Parboil rice with remaining spices and bay leaves. Layer rice over chicken, top with fried onions, mint, cilantro, saffron in water. Cover tight, cook on low 30 minutes. Add boiled potatoes in layers.

recipes.name: Gateaux Piment
recipes.instructions: Soak split peas 4 hours, drain and grind coarsely. Mix with chopped onions, scallions, cilantro, chili, cumin, salt, baking powder. Add water to make thick batter. Deep fry spoonfuls until golden and crispy. Drain on paper towels.

recipes.name: Curry Poulet
recipes.instructions: Heat oil, fry onions until soft. Add garlic, ginger, curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add chicken pieces, brown. Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 30 minutes. Add potatoes, cook until tender. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Bouillon
recipes.instructions: Boil beef in water with salt, thyme, garlic, ginger until tender (1.5 hours). Add all chopped Vegetable. Simmer 30 minutes until Vegetable soft. Season with pepper. Garnish with parsley. Serve as soup with rice.

recipes.name: Roti
recipes.instructions: Mix flour, salt, water to form soft dough. Knead 10 minutes, rest 30 minutes covered. Divide into balls, roll thin. Cook on hot griddle, brush with oil, flip when bubbles form. Cook until golden spots appear both sides.

recipes.name: Daube
recipes.instructions: Cut beef into cubes. Heat oil, brown meat. Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft. Add tomatoes, spices, thyme, salt, pepper, water, vinegar, sugar. Simmer covered 1.5 hours until meat tender and sauce thick.

recipes.name: Achard Legumes
recipes.instructions: Blanch Vegetable briefly, drain. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, turmeric. Add garlic, ginger, onions, cook 2 minutes. Add Vegetable, vinegar, salt, sugar, chili. Mix well, simmer 5 minutes. Cool and store. Serve as pickle/condiment.

recipes.name: Boulettes
recipes.instructions: Grind fish with soaked bread, half the onions, garlic, ginger, cilantro, cumin, salt, pepper, egg. Form balls. Make sauce: fry remaining onions, add tomatoes, thyme, chili, water, salt. Add fish balls gently, simmer 20 minutes.

recipes.name: Salade Palmiste
recipes.instructions: Slice hearts of palm. Dice tomatoes and onions. Mix all in bowl. Dress with lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper. Toss gently. Garnish with parsley. Chill before serving.

recipes.name: Curry Ourite
recipes.instructions: Clean and cut octopus. Boil 30 minutes until tender, drain. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, octopus, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 20 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Gateaux Patate
recipes.instructions: Boil and mash sweet potatoes. Mix with grated coconut, sugar, eggs, milk, vanilla, spices, flour, melted butter, baking powder. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 45 minutes until golden and set.

recipes.name: Riz Frit
recipes.instructions: Heat oil, scramble eggs, set aside. Stir-fry garlic, ginger, onions. Add carrots, peas, cook 3 minutes. Add rice, break up clumps. Add soy sauce, salt, pepper, eggs. Toss well on high heat. Garnish with scallions.

recipes.name: Mazavaroo
recipes.instructions: Cut fish into pieces. Grind chilies, ginger, garlic, turmeric, salt to paste. Rub paste over fish. Heat oil until very hot, fry fish until crispy and cooked through. Drizzle with lemon juice. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Puri
recipes.instructions: Mix flour, salt, water to form stiff dough. Knead well, rest 30 minutes. Roll into small circles. Deep fry in hot oil, pressing gently until they puff up. Drain on paper towels.

recipes.name: Cari Crevette
recipes.instructions: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger until soft. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 10 minutes. Add shrimp, coconut milk, cook 5 minutes until shrimp pink. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Napolitaine
recipes.instructions: Cook noodles, drain. Fry sliced sausages. Add onions, garlic, cook until soft. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, thyme, salt, pepper, sugar, water. Simmer 15 minutes. Toss with noodles. Top with parmesan.

recipes.name: Gateau Coco
recipes.instructions: Cream butter and sugar. Add eggs one at a time. Mix in grated coconut. Fold in flour, baking powder, salt alternating with milk. Add vanilla. Bake in greased pan at 180°C for 40 minutes.

recipes.name: Chatini Coco
recipes.instructions: Grate coconut finely. Grind chilies, garlic, onions with little water to paste. Mix with coconut, lemon juice, salt. Adjust consistency with water. Serve as condiment with curry and rice.

recipes.name: Samousa
recipes.instructions: Cook ground beef with onions, garlic, ginger, spices until done. Add boiled diced potatoes, peas, cilantro, chili. Cool. Make dough with flour and water, roll thin, cut into strips. Fill with mixture, fold into triangles. Deep fry until golden.

recipes.name: Pain Maison
recipes.instructions: Dissolve yeast and sugar in warm water. Mix with flour and salt. Knead 10 minutes. Add butter, knead until smooth. Let rise 1 hour. Shape into loaves. Let rise 30 minutes. Bake at 200°C for 30 minutes.

recipes.name: Cari Poule
recipes.instructions: Heat oil, add cinnamon, Bay leaf, dried. Fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add chicken pieces, brown all sides. Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 35 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Chatini Cotomili
recipes.instructions: Grate raw chayote. Finely chop onions, chilies, garlic. Mix all with lemon juice, salt, oil. Let sit 15 minutes before serving. Serve as fresh condiment.

recipes.name: Vindaye Ourite
recipes.instructions: Boil octopus until tender, cut into pieces. Toast mustard seeds, add curry powder, turmeric. Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft. Add vinegar, water, Bay leaf, dried, thyme, salt, chili. Simmer 10 minutes, add octopus, simmer 5 more minutes.

recipes.name: Gateau Arouille
recipes.instructions: Boil and mash taro. Mix with grated coconut, sugar, eggs, milk, vanilla, spices, flour, melted butter, baking powder. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 45 minutes until set and golden.

recipes.name: Rougaille Morue
recipes.instructions: Soak salt cod overnight, drain, shred. Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil. Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, pepper, little salt. Cook 15 minutes. Add shredded cod, cook 10 more minutes until sauce thickens. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Cari Zourite
recipes.instructions: Clean octopus, boil 30 minutes until tender, cut up. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric. Add tomatoes, octopus, thyme, salt, chili, water. Add potatoes, simmer 25 minutes until potatoes tender. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Alouda
recipes.instructions: Boil Agar agar in 100ml water until dissolved. Pour in flat dish to set, cut into strips. Boil milk with sugar and vanilla. Cool. In glasses, layer Agar agar strips, basil seeds (soaked), ice, sweetened milk. Serve cold.

recipes.name: Lasary Voem
recipes.instructions: Finely dice tomatoes and onions. Mix with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, chopped chili. Garnish with cilantro. Let sit 10 minutes before serving. Serve as fresh salad with meals.

recipes.name: Cari Canard
recipes.instructions: Cut duck into pieces. Heat oil, brown duck. Remove, set aside. Fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, duck, spices, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 1 hour. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Gateaux Manioc
recipes.instructions: Grate cassava finely, squeeze out excess liquid. Mix with grated coconut, sugar, eggs, milk, vanilla, cinnamon, melted butter, baking powder. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 50 minutes.

recipes.name: Satini Mangue
recipes.instructions: Grate unripe mango. Grind chilies and garlic. Mix all with lemon juice, salt, sugar. Let sit 10 minutes. Serve as tangy condiment with curries.

recipes.name: Cari Bichique
recipes.instructions: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 10 minutes. Add small fish carefully, cook gently 8 minutes without stirring much. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Gateau Banane
recipes.instructions: Mash bananas. Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla. Mix in mashed bananas. Fold in flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon alternating with milk. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 40 minutes.

recipes.name: Boudin Creole
recipes.instructions: Cook liver and pork until done, grind fine. Mix with cooked rice, sautéed onions, garlic, herbs, spices, salt, pepper, chili. Stuff into casings, tie off. Poach in simmering water 20 minutes.

recipes.name: Cari Tangue
recipes.instructions: Cut pork into cubes. Heat oil, brown pork. Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 40 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Pain Frit
recipes.instructions: Mix flour, yeast, sugar, salt, water to form soft dough. Knead 5 minutes, let rise 1 hour. Divide into small balls, flatten. Deep fry in hot oil until golden and puffed. Drain and serve warm.

recipes.name: Chatini Tomate
recipes.instructions: Finely chop tomatoes, onions, chilies, garlic, ginger. Mix all with salt, lemon juice, oil, cumin. Let sit 15 minutes. Serve as fresh chutney with curries and rice.

recipes.name: Cari Cabri
recipes.instructions: Cut goat into pieces. Heat oil, brown meat. Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook soft. Add curry powder, turmeric, coriander, cumin, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water. Simmer 1.5 hours. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Lasary Concombre
recipes.instructions: Slice cucumbers and onions thinly. Mix with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, chopped chili. Garnish with parsley. Chill before serving. Serve as fresh salad.

recipes.name: Rougaille Boucane
recipes.instructions: Soak salted fish 2 hours, drain, break into pieces. Fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, pepper, little salt. Cook 15 minutes. Add fish pieces, simmer 10 minutes. Serve with rice or bread.

recipes.name: Ladob Sale
recipes.instructions: Peel and cut plantains, cassava, sweet potato into chunks. Boil in salted water with onions, thyme, chili until half cooked. Add coconut milk, simmer until Vegetable tender and sauce thick. Serve as savory side dish.

recipes.name: Fricassee
recipes.instructions: Cut chicken into pieces. Heat oil, brown chicken. Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook soft. Add diced potatoes, carrots, soy sauce, thyme, salt, pepper, water. Cover, simmer 30 minutes until tender. Garnish with scallions.

recipes.name: Gateau Piment Mais
recipes.instructions: Blend corn kernels coarsely. Mix with flour, chopped onions, scallions, cilantro, chili, cumin, salt, baking powder, egg, milk to make thick batter. Deep fry spoonfuls until golden. Drain on paper towels.

recipes.name: Cari Camaron
recipes.instructions: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, tamarind, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 10 minutes. Add shrimp, coconut milk, cook 5 minutes until shrimp pink. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Gateau Pistache
recipes.instructions: Grind peanuts to coarse powder. Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla. Mix in ground peanuts, flour, baking powder, salt alternating with milk. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 35 minutes.

recipes.name: Cari Poisson
recipes.instructions: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger until soft. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 15 minutes. Add fish pieces gently, cook 10 minutes without stirring too much. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Chatini Citron
recipes.instructions: Remove lemon seeds, chop roughly with peel. Grind with chilies, garlic, salt, sugar, mustard to chunky paste. Add water to adjust consistency. Let sit 30 minutes before serving. Serve as tangy chutney.

recipes.name: Cari Cerf
recipes.instructions: Cut venison into cubes. Heat oil, brown meat. Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook soft. Add curry powder, turmeric, coriander, cumin, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water. Simmer 1.5 hours. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Gateau Ti Son
recipes.instructions: Mix wheat bran, flour, sugar, grated coconut, baking powder, salt. Beat eggs with milk and vanilla. Combine wet and dry ingredients, add melted butter. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 40 minutes.

recipes.name: Rougaille Saucisse Fumee
recipes.instructions: Slice sausages, brown in oil. Add onions, garlic, ginger, Bay leaf, dried, cook until soft. Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt, pepper. Simmer 25 minutes until thick. Garnish with scallions. Serve with rice or bread.

recipes.name: Cari Brede
recipes.instructions: Wash and chop spinach. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add spinach, salt, chili, water. Cook 15 minutes. Add coconut milk, simmer 5 minutes. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Gateau Miel
recipes.instructions: Cream butter, sugar, honey. Add eggs one at a time. Mix in flour, baking powder, salt, spices alternating with milk. Add vanilla. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 45 minutes until golden.

recipes.name: Bringelle Frite
recipes.instructions: Slice eggplant into rounds. Make batter with flour, water, turmeric, salt, pepper. Dip eggplant slices in batter. Deep fry in hot oil until golden and crispy. Drain on paper towels. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Cari Langue
recipes.instructions: Boil tongue 1 hour, peel skin, slice. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, tongue, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water. Simmer 40 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Chatini Ananas
recipes.instructions: Dice pineapple finely. Grind chilies, garlic, ginger with mustard, turmeric. Mix all with pineapple, salt, sugar, vinegar. Let sit 20 minutes before serving. Serve as sweet-spicy chutney.

recipes.name: Rougaille Corned Beef
recipes.instructions: Break up corned beef. Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil. Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, pepper, little salt. Cook 15 minutes. Add corned beef, mix well, cook 5 minutes. Garnish with scallions. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Gateau Gingembre
recipes.instructions: Grate ginger finely. Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla, molasses. Mix in grated ginger, flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon alternating with milk. Bake 180°C for 40 minutes.

recipes.name: Cari Tripe
recipes.instructions: Clean tripe thoroughly, cut into strips, boil 1 hour. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, tripe, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water. Simmer 1 hour. Add lemon juice, garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Satini Tamarin
recipes.instructions: Mix tamarind paste with water to dissolve. Grind chilies, garlic, cumin. Mix all with tamarind, sugar, salt. Cook on low heat 10 minutes, stirring. Cool before serving. Serve as tangy-sweet chutney.

recipes.name: Bouillon Creole
recipes.instructions: Boil beef and pork in water with salt, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, garlic, ginger 1.5 hours. Add all chopped Vegetable and leeks. Simmer 35 minutes. Season with pepper. Garnish with parsley and scallions.

recipes.name: Gateau Cassava
recipes.instructions: Grate cassava, squeeze out liquid. Mix with coconut milk, sugar, eggs, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, melted butter. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 55 minutes until golden and firm.

recipes.name: Cari Haricot
recipes.instructions: Soak beans overnight, drain, boil until tender. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cumin, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, beans, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water. Simmer 25 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Pain Rassis Grille
recipes.instructions: Slice stale bread thick. Beat eggs with milk and vanilla. Dip bread in mixture. Fry in butter until golden both sides. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar. Serve warm as breakfast or snack.

recipes.name: Vindaye Poulet
recipes.instructions: Cut cooked chicken into pieces. Toast mustard seeds, add curry powder, turmeric. Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft. Add vinegar, water, Bay leaf, dried, thyme, salt, chili. Simmer 10 minutes, add chicken, simmer 8 more minutes.

recipes.name: Gateau Fruit
recipes.instructions: Soak dried fruits in rum 1 hour. Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla. Mix in flour, baking powder, salt, spices alternating with milk. Fold in fruits and lemon peel. Bake 160°C for 60 minutes.

recipes.name: Cari Lentille
recipes.instructions: Rinse lentils. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cumin, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, lentils, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 35 minutes until lentils soft. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Lasary Betrave
recipes.instructions: Boil beets until tender, peel and dice. Slice onions thinly. Mix beets and onions with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper. Garnish with parsley. Chill before serving. Serve as colorful salad.

recipes.name: Rougaille Thon
recipes.instructions: Cut tuna into chunks. Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil. Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt, pepper. Cook 15 minutes. Add tuna, cook gently 10 minutes. Garnish with scallions. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Gateau Farine Mais
recipes.instructions: Mix cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, salt, spices. Beat eggs with coconut milk and vanilla. Combine wet and dry ingredients. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 45 minutes until golden.

recipes.name: Cari Pois Chiche
recipes.instructions: Soak chickpeas overnight, boil until tender. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cumin, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, chickpeas, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 25 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Chatini Bilimbi
recipes.instructions: Chop bilimbi (or starfruit) roughly, remove seeds. Grind with chilies, garlic, salt, sugar to chunky paste. Add water to adjust consistency. Let sit 15 minutes. Serve as sour-spicy chutney with curries.

recipes.name: Brede Songe
recipes.instructions: Remove stems from taro leaves, chop. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add leaves, salt, chili, water. Cook covered 25 minutes. Add coconut milk, simmer 5 minutes. Serve as vegetable side.

recipes.name: Gateau Cravate
recipes.instructions: Make dough with flour, water, egg, 20g sugar, vanilla. Roll thin, cut into strips, twist into bow shapes. Deep fry until golden. Melt remaining sugar with butter, honey, cinnamon. Dip fried bows in syrup. Cool on rack.

recipes.name: Cari Queue Boeuf
recipes.instructions: Cut oxtail into segments. Heat oil, brown oxtail. Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook soft. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water. Simmer 2 hours. Add carrots, cook 30 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Lasary Papaye
recipes.instructions: Grate green papaya or dice ripe papaya. Slice onions thinly. Mix with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, chopped chili. Garnish with mint. Let sit 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.name: Rougaille Z'Andouille
recipes.instructions: Slice sausages. Fry in oil until browned. Add onions, garlic, ginger, Bay leaf, dried, cook until soft. Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt, pepper. Simmer 20 minutes until sauce thickens. Serve with bread or rice.

recipes.name: Gateau Tamarin
recipes.instructions: Dissolve tamarind in water. Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla. Mix in tamarind water, flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon alternating with milk. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 40 minutes.

recipes.name: Cari Chou Chou
recipes.instructions: Peel and cube chayote. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, chayote, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 20 minutes. Add coconut milk, cook 5 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Satini Coriandre
recipes.instructions: Wash cilantro well. Blend with chilies, garlic, cumin, salt, lemon juice, water to smooth paste. Adjust consistency with more water if needed. Serve fresh as green chutney with snacks.

recipes.name: Beignets Banane
recipes.instructions: Mash bananas. Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon. Beat egg with milk and vanilla. Combine all with mashed bananas. Drop spoonfuls in hot oil, fry until golden. Drain, dust with powdered sugar.

recipes.name: Cari Ti Jacques
recipes.instructions: Cut young jackfruit into chunks. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, jackfruit, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 30 minutes. Add coconut milk, cook 5 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Pain Perdu
recipes.instructions: Beat eggs with milk, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon. Dip bread slices in mixture. Fry in butter until golden both sides. Dust with powdered sugar. Serve warm for breakfast.

recipes.name: Cari Palmiste
recipes.instructions: Slice hearts of palm. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, palm hearts, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 15 minutes. Add coconut milk, cook 5 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Chatini Pomme D'Amour
recipes.instructions: Blanch tomatoes, peel, chop. Grind chilies, garlic, ginger, cumin. Mix with tomatoes, salt, sugar, lemon juice, oil. Cook on low 10 minutes. Cool before serving. Serve as cooked chutney.

recipes.name: Gateaux Avocat
recipes.instructions: Mash avocado with lime juice. Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla. Mix in mashed avocado, flour, baking powder, salt alternating with milk. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 40 minutes.

recipes.name: Cari Brinjal
recipes.instructions: Cut eggplant into chunks. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, eggplant, tamarind, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 25 minutes until soft. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Lasary Carotte
recipes.instructions: Grate carrots finely. Slice onions thin. Toast cumin seeds lightly. Mix all with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, cumin. Garnish with parsley. Let sit 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.name: Rougaille Sardine
recipes.instructions: Drain sardines. Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil. Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt, pepper. Cook 15 minutes. Add sardines gently, cook 5 minutes. Add lemon juice. Serve with bread or rice.

recipes.name: Gateau Cerise
recipes.instructions: Pit cherries. Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla, almond extract. Mix in flour, baking powder, salt alternating with milk. Fold in cherries gently. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 45 minutes.

recipes.name: Cari Concombre
recipes.instructions: Peel and cube cucumber. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, cucumber, salt, chili, water. Simmer 15 minutes. Add coconut milk, cook 5 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Chatini Menthe
recipes.instructions: Wash herbs well. Blend mint, cilantro, chilies, garlic, cumin, salt, lemon juice, water to smooth paste. Adjust consistency. Serve fresh as cooling green chutney with fried foods.

recipes.name: Beignets Giraumon
recipes.instructions: Cook and mash pumpkin. Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, spices. Beat egg with milk and vanilla. Combine all with pumpkin. Drop spoonfuls in hot oil, fry until golden. Drain, dust with powdered sugar.

recipes.name: Cari Giraumon
recipes.instructions: Peel and cube pumpkin. Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, pumpkin, thyme, salt, chili, water. Simmer 20 minutes until soft. Add coconut milk, cook 5 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Lasary Chou
recipes.instructions: Shred cabbage finely. Grate carrots. Slice onions thin. Mix all with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, toasted cumin. Garnish with parsley. Let sit 15 minutes before serving.

recipes.name: Rougaille Ti Jacques
recipes.instructions: Cut young jackfruit into chunks. Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil. Add tomatoes, jackfruit, thyme, chili, salt, pepper. Cook covered 30 minutes until jackfruit tender. Serve as vegetable curry.

recipes.name: Ramen
recipes.instructions: Simmer broth with garlic, ginger, soy sauce, mirin, sake. Slice pork thin, sear. Boil eggs 7 minutes, peel, halve. Cook noodles, divide into bowls. Pour hot broth, top with pork, eggs, bamboo shoots, corn, scallions, nori. Drizzle sesame oil.

recipes.name: Sushi Rice
recipes.instructions: Rinse rice until water runs clear. Cook rice with water. Heat vinegar, sugar, salt until dissolved. When rice done, fold in vinegar mixture gently while rice warm. Cool to room temperature before making sushi.

recipes.name: Miso Soup
recipes.instructions: Heat water, add dashi powder. Cut tofu into cubes. Rehydrate wakame. When water simmers, add tofu and wakame. Dissolve miso in small amount of broth, add to pot. Remove from heat immediately. Garnish with sliced scallions.

recipes.name: Tempura
recipes.instructions: Mix flour, egg, ice water lightly (keep lumpy). Slice Vegetable. Devein shrimp. Heat oil to 180°C. Dip ingredients in batter, fry until crisp. Drain. Make dipping sauce: heat water, dashi, soy sauce, mirin. Serve tempura with sauce, grated daikon and ginger.

recipes.name: Yakitori
recipes.instructions: Cut chicken into bite-size pieces. Cut scallions into 3cm pieces. Thread alternating chicken and scallions on skewers. Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, grated ginger, garlic. Grill skewers, brushing with sauce frequently until cooked and glazed. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Gyoza
recipes.instructions: Finely chop cabbage, salt, squeeze out water. Mix pork, cabbage, chives, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, pepper. Place filling in wrappers, fold. Heat oil in pan, add gyoza, fry until bottom golden. Add water, cover, steam 5 minutes. Uncover, cook until crispy. Serve with dipping sauce: rice vinegar, soy sauce, chili oil.

recipes.name: Teriyaki Chicken
recipes.instructions: Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, grated ginger, garlic for sauce. Heat oil, sear chicken skin-side down until golden. Flip, cook until done. Pour sauce over, simmer until thick and glossy. Slice, garnish with sesame seeds and scallions.

recipes.name: Okonomiyaki
recipes.instructions: Shred cabbage finely. Mix flour, eggs, water, dashi powder. Fold in cabbage and scallions. Heat oil in pan, pour batter, flatten. Top with bacon. Flip when bottom set, cook until done. Top with sauce, mayonnaise, bonito flakes, nori, ginger.

recipes.name: Tonkatsu
recipes.instructions: Pound pork cutlets to even thickness. Coat in flour, dip in beaten eggs, press into breadcrumbs. Deep fry at 170°C until golden and cooked through, 5-6 minutes. Drain. Slice into strips. Serve with shredded cabbage, tonkatsu sauce, sesame seeds, lemon wedges.

recipes.name: Udon
recipes.instructions: Heat water with dashi powder, soy sauce, mirin. Cook udon according to package. Drain, divide into bowls. Pour hot broth over. Top with sliced fish cake, rehydrated wakame, sliced scallions, poached egg, tempura bits.

recipes.name: Katsu Curry
recipes.instructions: Prepare tonkatsu: coat pork in flour, egg, breadcrumbs, fry. For curry: sauté onions, garlic, ginger, add curry powder, flour, cook. Add diced Vegetable, water, soy sauce, Worcestershire, honey, grated apple. Simmer until thick. Serve curry with rice and sliced tonkatsu.

recipes.name: Chawanmushi
recipes.instructions: Beat eggs gently with dashi, soy sauce, mirin, salt. Strain. Divide chicken, shrimp, mushrooms, spinach, fish cake into cups. Pour egg mixture over. Steam covered 15 minutes until just set. Garnish with lemon zest.

recipes.name: Takoyaki
recipes.instructions: Mix flour, eggs, dashi, baking powder to make batter. Heat takoyaki pan, oil wells. Pour batter, add octopus piece, ginger, scallions, tempura bits to each. Turn with picks to form balls. Cook until golden. Top with sauce, mayonnaise, bonito flakes, nori.

recipes.name: Soba
recipes.instructions: Make broth: heat water with dashi powder, soy sauce, mirin, sugar. Cook soba noodles, rinse in cold water, drain. For hot soba: serve noodles in hot broth. For cold soba: serve noodles chilled with cold dipping sauce, wasabi, scallions, nori. Add tempura on side.

recipes.name: Oyakodon
recipes.instructions: Slice chicken and onions. Simmer dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake. Add onions, cook 3 minutes. Add chicken, cook until done. Beat eggs, pour over, cover, cook until eggs just set. Serve over hot rice, garnish with scallions and nori.

recipes.name: Yakiniku
recipes.instructions: Slice beef very thin. Mix soy sauce, sake, mirin, sugar, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, sesame seeds for marinade. Marinate beef 30 minutes. Grill over high heat until caramelized. Serve with rice, lettuce wraps, perilla leaves, kimchi.

recipes.name: Natto
recipes.instructions: Stir natto vigorously until stringy. Mix with soy sauce, mustard, chopped scallions. Serve over hot rice. Wrap in nori if desired. Eat immediately while natto is fresh and sticky.

recipes.name: Tamagoyaki
recipes.instructions: Beat eggs with dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, salt. Heat rectangular pan, oil lightly. Pour thin layer of egg, cook until almost set. Roll up from one end. Push to end of pan. Add more egg mixture, lift rolled egg, let mixture flow under. Roll again. Repeat until all egg used. Cool, slice.

recipes.name: Nikujaga
recipes.instructions: Cut beef thin, Vegetable into chunks. Heat oil, brown beef. Add onions, cook until soft. Add potatoes, carrots, dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake. Simmer 20 minutes until tender. Add peas, cook 3 minutes. Garnish with scallions.

recipes.name: Karaage
recipes.instructions: Cut chicken into bite-size pieces. Marinate in soy sauce, sake, grated ginger, garlic for 30 minutes. Coat in potato starch. Deep fry at 170°C for 3 minutes, rest 2 minutes, fry again 1 minute until crispy and golden. Serve with lemon, mayonnaise, lettuce.

recipes.name: Shabu Shabu
recipes.instructions: Slice beef paper-thin. Prepare Vegetable. Make broth: simmer water with kombu. Set up hot pot at table. Each person swishes beef and Vegetable in boiling broth until cooked. Dip in ponzu or sesame sauce mixed with condiments. Add noodles at end. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Onigiri
recipes.instructions: Mix tuna with mayo and soy sauce for filling. Grill salmon, flake. With wet salted hands, form rice into triangles. Make indent, add filling (tuna, salmon, or umeboshi), seal with more rice. Wrap in nori. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Sukiyaki
recipes.instructions: Slice beef thin. Cut Vegetable and tofu. Mix soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake for sauce. Heat pot, add fat from beef to grease. Add beef, sauce, cook. Add Vegetable, tofu, noodles, simmer until done. Each person dips cooked items in raw beaten egg before eating. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Agedashi Tofu
recipes.instructions: Cut tofu into cubes, drain well. Coat in potato starch. Deep fry at 180°C until golden and crispy. Drain. Heat dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar. Place fried tofu in bowls, pour hot broth over. Top with grated daikon, ginger, scallions, bonito flakes.

recipes.name: Yaki Udon
recipes.instructions: Slice pork and Vegetable. Heat oil in wok, stir-fry pork. Add Vegetable, garlic, ginger, cook 3 minutes. Add udon noodles, soy sauce, mirin, sake, oyster sauce, sesame oil. Toss well. Garnish with scallions, bonito flakes, pickled ginger.

recipes.name: Korokke
recipes.instructions: Boil potatoes, mash. Sauté onions and beef, mix with potatoes, salt, pepper. Shape into oval patties. Coat in flour, egg, breadcrumbs. Deep fry at 170°C until golden. Drain. Serve with tonkatsu sauce and shredded cabbage.

recipes.name: Yakisoba
recipes.instructions: Slice pork and Vegetable thin. Heat oil in wok, stir-fry pork. Add Vegetable, cook 3 minutes. Add noodles, yakisoba sauce, toss well over high heat. Serve topped with pickled ginger, nori strips, bonito flakes, scallions.

recipes.name: Dango
recipes.instructions: Mix rice flour, sugar with hot water to form dough. Shape into small balls. Boil until they float, 3 minutes. Drain. Make glaze: simmer soy sauce, mirin, sugar, dissolved potato starch in water until thick. Thread dango on skewers, brush with glaze. Grill or broil briefly.

recipes.name: Chirashi Sushi
recipes.instructions: Make sushi rice with vinegar, sugar, salt. Make thin omelet from eggs, slice. Slice fish, Vegetable. Spread rice in bowls. Arrange fish, shrimp, omelet, cucumber, avocado on top. Garnish with nori, sesame seeds. Serve with pickled ginger, wasabi, soy sauce.

recipes.name: Zaru Soba
recipes.instructions: Make dipping sauce: simmer dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, cool. Cook soba, rinse in ice water until cold, drain well. Serve noodles on bamboo mat over plate. Serve cold dipping sauce in cups with wasabi, scallions, nori. Eat by dipping noodles. Serve tempura on side.

recipes.name: Hiyayakko
recipes.instructions: Cut chilled tofu into blocks. Place in bowls. Top with grated ginger, sliced scallions, bonito flakes, nori strips. Drizzle with soy sauce just before serving. Serve as cold appetizer.

recipes.name: Kakiage
recipes.instructions: Julienne Vegetable, chop shrimp. Mix lightly with flour. Make tempura batter. Mix Vegetable and shrimp with batter. Drop spoonfuls into hot oil, fry until golden and crispy. Drain. Serve with dipping sauce and grated daikon, ginger.

recipes.name: Tonjiru
recipes.instructions: Cut pork and Vegetable into bite-size pieces. Sauté pork in sesame oil with ginger. Add Vegetable (except scallions), dashi, sake, simmer 20 minutes. Add tofu, simmer 5 minutes. Dissolve miso in broth, add to pot. Remove from heat. Garnish with scallions.

recipes.name: Omurice
recipes.instructions: Dice chicken and Vegetable. Sauté in butter, add rice, ketchup, salt, pepper, mix well. Beat eggs with milk. Make thin omelets. Place rice mixture on each omelet, fold over. Top with ketchup, garnish with parsley.

recipes.name: Kakuni
recipes.instructions: Cut pork into 5cm cubes. Blanch 5 minutes, drain. Put pork, scallions, ginger in pot with water, simmer 1 hour. Add soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, simmer 2 hours until very tender. Add boiled eggs, simmer 30 minutes. Serve with mustard.

recipes.name: Edamame
recipes.instructions: Boil water with 20g salt. Add edamame, boil 5 minutes until tender. Drain. Sprinkle with remaining salt. Serve warm or cold as snack or appetizer.

recipes.name: Nasu Dengaku
recipes.instructions: Halve eggplants lengthwise, score flesh in diamond pattern. Brush with oil, grill or broil until soft. Mix miso, sugar, mirin, sake, cook until thick. Spread miso glaze on eggplant. Broil until caramelized. Garnish with sesame seeds and scallions.

recipes.name: Oden
recipes.instructions: Cut daikon into thick rounds, parboil. Cut other ingredients into pieces. Make broth: simmer dashi with kombu, soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar. Add all ingredients, simmer gently 1-2 hours. Serve hot in bowls with broth and mustard.

recipes.name: Yudofu
recipes.instructions: Cut tofu into cubes. Put kombu in pot with water, add tofu, heat gently without boiling. Each person takes tofu from pot, dips in ponzu sauce with scallions, grated ginger, bonito flakes, sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Chikuzenni
recipes.instructions: Rehydrate shiitake. Cut all ingredients bite-size. Heat sesame oil, sauté chicken. Add Vegetable, stir-fry 5 minutes. Add dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake. Simmer 30 minutes until tender. Add peas, cook 3 minutes.

recipes.name: Hayashi Rice
recipes.instructions: Slice beef thin, onions and mushrooms. Sauté beef in butter. Add onions, mushrooms, cook until soft. Add flour, cook 2 minutes. Add tomato paste, ketchup, water, wine, soy sauce, Worcestershire, sugar, Bay leaf, dried. Simmer 30 minutes. Serve over rice, garnish with parsley.

recipes.name: Taiyaki
recipes.instructions: Mix flour, baking powder, sugar. Beat egg with milk, combine with dry ingredients. Heat taiyaki mold, brush with oil. Pour batter to half fill, add red bean paste, cover with more batter. Close mold, cook 2 minutes each side until golden. Serve warm.

recipes.name: Daigaku Imo
recipes.instructions: Cut sweet potatoes into chunks. Deep fry at 170°C until golden and tender. Drain. Make syrup: heat sugar, water, soy sauce, mirin until thick. Add fried sweet potatoes, toss to coat. Sprinkle with sesame seeds. Serve warm.

recipes.name: Negimaki
recipes.instructions: Slice beef very thin, pound flat. Cut scallions into lengths. Place scallions on beef, roll up tight. Secure with toothpicks. Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, grated ginger. Sear beef rolls in oil, add sauce, simmer until cooked and glazed. Remove picks, slice. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Mizutaki
recipes.instructions: Make light broth: simmer water with kombu. Cut chicken and Vegetable. Set up hot pot at table with simmering broth. Each person cooks chicken and Vegetable in pot. Dip in ponzu sauce with daikon, scallions, chili paste. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Mentaiko Pasta
recipes.instructions: Cook pasta al dente. Remove membrane from mentaiko. Melt butter, add mentaiko, soy sauce, cream. Toss with hot pasta. Garnish with nori strips, scallions, squeeze of lemon. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Katsudon
recipes.instructions: Make tonkatsu: coat pork in flour, 2 eggs, breadcrumbs, fry. Slice. Simmer dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar with sliced onions. Add tonkatsu slices. Beat 4 eggs, pour over, cook until just set. Serve over rice in bowls, garnish with scallions and pickled ginger.

recipes.name: Anmitsu
recipes.instructions: Dissolve Agar agar in boiling water with sugar. Pour in pan to set, cut into cubes. Arrange Agar agar cubes, red bean paste, fruit, mochi pieces in bowls. Pour shirataki syrup over. Top with scoop of ice cream. Serve as cold dessert.

recipes.name: Dorayaki
recipes.instructions: Mix flour, baking powder. Beat eggs with sugar and honey until fluffy. Fold in flour and milk. Heat griddle, brush with oil. Pour small circles of batter, cook until bubbles form, flip, cook until done. Sandwich red bean paste between two pancakes. Serve warm or room temperature.

recipes.name: Shabu Shabu Salad
recipes.instructions: Slice beef paper-thin. Blanch briefly in boiling water until just cooked, drain, chill. Cut Vegetable. Arrange lettuce, Vegetable, beef on plates. Mix ponzu sauce with sesame oil and grated ginger. Drizzle over salad. Garnish with sesame seeds and scallions.

recipes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.instructions: Cook pasta al dente. Fry bacon until crispy, add garlic briefly. Beat eggs with parmesan, romano, pepper. Drain pasta, reserve pasta water. Toss hot pasta with bacon off heat. Add egg mixture, toss quickly, add pasta water to create creamy sauce. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Margherita Pizza
recipes.instructions: Make dough: mix flour, water, yeast, sugar, salt, oil, knead, rise 1 hour. Make sauce: blend tomatoes, garlic, oregano, salt. Roll dough thin. Spread sauce, top with mozzarella, parmesan. Bake 250°C for 10-12 minutes. Top with fresh basil.

recipes.name: Lasagna
recipes.instructions: Make meat sauce: sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic, add beef, brown. Add tomatoes, paste, wine, herbs, Bay leaf, dried, sugar, salt, pepper. Simmer 1 hour. Mix ricotta with egg, parsley, salt, nutmeg. Cook noodles. Layer: sauce, noodles, ricotta, mozzarella. Repeat. Top with parmesan. Bake 180°C covered 40 minutes, uncovered 15 minutes.

recipes.name: Risotto alla Milanese
recipes.instructions: Heat broth, keep warm. Sauté minced onions in butter and oil until soft. Add rice, toast 2 minutes. Add wine, stir until absorbed. Add saffron to broth. Add broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly, letting each addition absorb before adding more, 18-20 minutes. Stir in bone marrow, butter, parmesan. Season with salt, pepper.

recipes.name: Osso Buco
recipes.instructions: Season veal shanks, dredge in flour. Brown in oil and butter. Remove. Sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic. Add tomatoes, wine, broth, herbs, Bay leaf, dried. Return veal, cover, simmer 2 hours until tender. Make gremolata: mix lemon zest, parsley, garlic, anchovies. Serve osso buco with gremolata on top.

recipes.name: Penne Arrabbiata
recipes.instructions: Crush tomatoes. Heat olive oil, sauté sliced garlic and chopped chili until fragrant. Add tomatoes, salt, simmer 20 minutes. Cook pasta al dente. Toss with sauce, torn basil, parsley. Serve with parmesan.

recipes.name: Tiramisu
recipes.instructions: Beat egg yolks with sugar until thick. Fold in mascarpone gently. Beat egg whites to stiff peaks, fold in. Mix espresso with liqueur. Quickly dip ladyfingers in coffee, layer in dish. Spread half mascarpone cream. Repeat layers. Refrigerate 4 hours. Dust heavily with cocoa before serving.

recipes.name: Caprese Salad
recipes.instructions: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella thickly. Arrange alternating on platter. Tuck basil leaves between. Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar. Season with salt and fresh black pepper. Serve at room temperature.

recipes.name: Fettuccine Alfredo
recipes.instructions: Cook fettuccine al dente. Melt butter, add cream, simmer 3 minutes. Add parmesan, stir until smooth. Season with nutmeg, salt, pepper. Toss with hot pasta and pasta water to create silky sauce. Garnish with parsley and more parmesan.

recipes.name: Minestrone
recipes.instructions: Sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic in olive oil. Add tomatoes, broth, potatoes, cabbage, beans, herbs, Bay leaf, dried. Simmer 30 minutes. Add zucchini and pasta, cook 12 minutes. Season with salt, pepper. Serve with parmesan, parsley, drizzle of olive oil.

recipes.name: Panna Cotta
recipes.instructions: Bloom gelatin in cold water. Heat cream, milk, sugar, vanilla until sugar dissolves. Remove from heat, stir in gelatin until dissolved. Pour into molds, refrigerate 4 hours until set. Make berry sauce: simmer berries with sugar and lemon juice 10 minutes. Cool. Unmold panna cotta, serve with berry sauce.

recipes.name: Chicken Parmigiana
recipes.instructions: Pound chicken thin. Coat in flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs mixed with parmesan. Fry in olive oil until golden. Make sauce: sauté garlic, add tomatoes, basil, oregano, salt, pepper, simmer 20 minutes. Place chicken in baking dish, top with sauce, mozzarella, parmesan. Bake 180°C for 20 minutes. Serve with pasta.

recipes.name: Bruschetta
recipes.instructions: Slice bread thick, grill or toast. Rub with cut garlic. Dice tomatoes, mix with torn basil, olive oil, balsamic, salt, pepper. Let sit 10 minutes. Top bread with tomato mixture. Drizzle with more olive oil. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Gnocchi
recipes.instructions: Boil potatoes, peel, mash while hot. Mix with flour, egg, salt, nutmeg to form soft dough. Roll into ropes, cut into pieces, press with fork. Boil in salted water until they float. Drain. Sauté in butter with sage until lightly browned. Serve with parmesan.

recipes.name: Pesto Pasta
recipes.instructions: Blend basil, pine nuts, garlic, salt, pepper. Add parmesan and pecorino. Slowly add olive oil while blending until smooth. Cook pasta al dente. Reserve pasta water. Toss pasta with pesto, adding pasta water and cream to create creamy consistency. Serve with extra parmesan.

recipes.name: Saltimbocca
recipes.instructions: Pound veal thin. Top each with prosciutto and sage leaves, secure with toothpick. Dredge in flour. Sauté in butter and oil sage-side down first, 2 minutes each side. Remove, keep warm. Add wine and lemon juice to pan, simmer 2 minutes. Pour sauce over veal. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Arancini
recipes.instructions: Mix cooked rice with beaten egg, parmesan, saffron, salt, pepper. Make filling: sauté onions, garlic, add beef, tomato sauce, peas. Cool. Form rice into balls with filling and mozzarella cube in center. Coat in flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs. Deep fry at 180°C until golden. Drain. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Cacio e Pepe
recipes.instructions: Toast coarsely ground black pepper in dry pan. Cook pasta in well-salted water until al dente. Reserve 2 cups pasta water. Drain pasta. Mix pecorino with pasta water to make creamy paste. Toss hot pasta with cheese paste and toasted pepper, adding more pasta water as needed for creamy consistency.

recipes.name: Ribollita
recipes.instructions: Sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic in olive oil. Add tomatoes, broth, potatoes, herbs, Bay leaf, dried, simmer 30 minutes. Add beans, kale, cabbage, simmer 20 minutes. Add torn bread, let soak 10 minutes. Season with salt, pepper. Serve with olive oil, parmesan, parsley.

recipes.name: Vitello Tonnato
recipes.instructions: Poach veal with wine, Vegetable, Bay leaf, dried, salt until tender, 1.5 hours. Cool, slice thin. Blend tuna, anchovies, capers, egg yolks, lemon juice. Slowly add olive oil to make thick sauce. Thin with cooking liquid if needed. Arrange veal on platter, cover with tuna sauce. Garnish with capers and parsley. Chill before serving.

recipes.name: Focaccia
recipes.instructions: Mix flour, water, yeast, sugar, salt, 40g olive oil. Knead, let rise 1 hour. Press into oiled pan, dimple with fingers. Drizzle with remaining olive oil, sprinkle with rosemary and coarse salt. Let rise 30 minutes. Bake 220°C for 25 minutes until golden.

recipes.name: Pasta e Fagioli
recipes.instructions: Soak beans overnight, drain. Sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic in olive oil. Add beans, tomatoes, broth, rosemary, Bay leaf, dried. Simmer 1.5 hours until beans tender. Mash some beans to thicken. Add pasta, cook until done. Season with salt, pepper. Serve with olive oil, parmesan, parsley.

recipes.name: Carbonara di Zucchine
recipes.instructions: Cut zucchini into matchsticks. Sauté with garlic in olive oil until tender. Cook pasta al dente. Beat eggs with pecorino, parmesan, pepper. Toss hot pasta with zucchini off heat. Add egg mixture, toss quickly. Add pasta water to create creamy sauce. Garnish with torn mint and basil.

recipes.name: Sfogliatelle
recipes.instructions: Make dough: mix flour, water, salt, knead until smooth. Rest 1 hour. Roll very thin, brush with melted lard, roll up, chill. Make filling: mix ricotta, sugar, eggs, semolina, orange zest, vanilla, cinnamon, candied fruit. Slice dough, shape into cones, fill. Bake 200°C for 25 minutes. Dust with powdered sugar.

recipes.name: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
recipes.instructions: Cook pasta in well-salted water. Heat olive oil, add sliced garlic and chopped chili, cook gently until garlic golden. Toast breadcrumbs in separate pan. Toss drained pasta with garlic oil, add pasta water to emulsify. Add parsley, pepper. Top with breadcrumbs and parmesan.

recipes.name: Eggplant Parmigiana
recipes.instructions: Slice eggplant, salt, let drain 30 minutes. Pat dry. Coat in flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs. Fry until golden. Make sauce: sauté garlic, add tomatoes, basil, oregano, sugar, salt, pepper, simmer 20 minutes. Layer: sauce, eggplant, mozzarella, parmesan. Repeat. Bake 180°C for 40 minutes.

recipes.name: Ossobuco alla Milanese
recipes.instructions: Tie veal shanks, season, dredge in flour. Brown in oil and butter. Remove. Sauté Vegetable. Add wine, reduce. Add tomatoes, stock, herbs. Return veal, braise covered 2 hours. Make gremolata: lemon zest, parsley, garlic, anchovies. Serve with gremolata and saffron risotto.

recipes.name: Polenta
recipes.instructions: Bring salted water to boil. Slowly whisk in cornmeal. Reduce heat, cook stirring constantly 40 minutes until thick and pulling from sides. Stir in butter, parmesan, milk. Serve soft or pour into pan, cool, slice and grill.

recipes.name: Pasta alla Norma
recipes.instructions: Cube eggplant, salt, drain 30 minutes. Pat dry, fry in olive oil until golden. Drain. Make sauce: sauté garlic, add crushed tomatoes, chili, salt, simmer 20 minutes. Cook pasta al dente. Toss with sauce and eggplant. Top with torn basil and grated ricotta salata.

recipes.name: Cannoli
recipes.instructions: Make dough: mix flour, sugar, butter, egg, wine, vinegar, salt. Knead, rest 1 hour. Roll thin, cut circles, wrap around cannoli tubes. Deep fry until golden. Cool, remove tubes. Make filling: mix ricotta, sugar, chocolate chips, candied fruit, vanilla, cinnamon, orange zest. Pipe into shells. Dip ends in pistachios. Dust with powdered sugar.

recipes.name: Amatriciana
recipes.instructions: Cut bacon into strips, render fat. Add diced onions, cook until soft. Add wine, reduce. Add crushed tomatoes, chili, salt, pepper, simmer 20 minutes. Cook pasta al dente. Toss with sauce and pasta water. Serve with pecorino and black pepper.

recipes.name: Zabaglione
recipes.instructions: Beat egg yolks with sugar and lemon zest in heatproof bowl. Add marsala. Place over simmering water, whisk constantly until thick and tripled in volume, 8-10 minutes. Do not let boil. Serve warm in glasses with fresh berries.

recipes.name: Carciofi alla Romana
recipes.instructions: Clean artichokes, remove tough outer leaves, trim stems. Rub with lemon. Mix garlic, parsley, mint, breadcrumbs, pecorino, salt, pepper. Stuff between artichoke leaves. Place upside down in pot with olive oil, wine, water. Cover, braise 40 minutes until tender.

recipes.name: Pappardelle al Ragu
recipes.instructions: Dice meats. Sauté Vegetable in oil and butter until soft. Add meats, brown. Add wine, reduce. Add tomatoes, paste, herbs, Bay leaf, dried, milk, salt, pepper, nutmeg. Simmer covered 3 hours, stirring occasionally. Cook pappardelle. Toss with ragu. Serve with parmesan.

recipes.name: Frittata
recipes.instructions: Sauté onions, peppers, zucchini in olive oil until tender. Beat eggs with milk, parmesan, torn basil, salt, pepper. Pour over Vegetable in pan. Cook on low, lifting edges to let uncooked egg flow under. When almost set, finish under broiler until puffed and golden. Slice into wedges.

recipes.name: Spaghetti alla Puttanesca
recipes.instructions: Heat olive oil, sauté garlic, anchovies, chili until anchovies melt. Add crushed tomatoes, olives, capers, oregano, salt, pepper. Simmer 20 minutes. Cook pasta al dente. Toss with sauce. Garnish with parsley. No cheese traditionally served with this.

recipes.name: Biscotti
recipes.instructions: Toast almonds. Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt. Beat eggs with melted butter, vanilla, almond extract, orange zest. Combine with dry ingredients, fold in almonds. Shape into logs. Bake 180°C for 30 minutes. Cool 10 minutes, slice diagonally. Bake slices 10 minutes each side until crisp. Cool completely.

recipes.name: Pasta Primavera
recipes.instructions: Cut Vegetable into bite-size pieces. Blanch asparagus and peas briefly. Sauté garlic in butter and oil. Add zucchini, peppers, cook 5 minutes. Add asparagus, peas, tomatoes, cook 3 minutes. Add cream, simmer 5 minutes. Cook pasta al dente. Toss with Vegetable, basil, parsley, lemon juice, parmesan. Season with salt, pepper.

recipes.name: Panettone
recipes.instructions: Dissolve yeast in warm milk with 30g sugar. Let foam. Mix with 100g flour, let rise 1 hour. Add remaining flour, sugar, eggs, yolks, honey, vanilla, citrus zests, salt. Knead, gradually add soft butter. Knead until smooth and elastic. Let rise 3 hours. Fold in raisins, candied peels soaked in rum. Shape into tall round, place in mold. Let rise 3 hours. Bake 180°C for 50 minutes. Cool completely.

recipes.name: Pasta alla Gricia
recipes.instructions: Cut guanciale into strips, render fat on medium heat until crispy. Remove from heat. Cook pasta in well-salted water. Reserve pasta water. Mix pecorino with pasta water to make paste. Toss hot drained pasta with guanciale and fat, pecorino paste, lots of black pepper. Add more pasta water as needed for creamy sauce.

recipes.name: Stracciatella Soup
recipes.instructions: Heat broth to simmer. Beat eggs with parmesan, semolina, nutmeg. Slowly drizzle egg mixture into simmering broth, stirring constantly to create ribbons. Add chopped spinach, cook 2 minutes. Season with lemon juice, salt, pepper. Garnish with parsley.

recipes.name: Supplì
recipes.instructions: Mix cooked rice with tomato sauce, ground beef, peas, parmesan, 1 beaten egg, salt, pepper. Cool. Form into ovals with mozzarella cube in center. Coat in flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs. Deep fry at 180°C until golden. Drain. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Pasta con le Sarde
recipes.instructions: Boil fennel in salted water until tender, reserve water. Chop fennel. Soak raisins and saffron. Sauté onions, anchovies in olive oil until anchovies melt. Add tomato paste, fennel, raisins, saffron, pine nuts, fennel seeds. Cook pasta in fennel water. Toss with sauce and sardines. Top with toasted breadcrumbs and parsley.

recipes.name: Affogato
recipes.instructions: Place scoops of vanilla gelato in cups or glasses. Brew hot espresso. Pour hot espresso over gelato just before serving. Drizzle with amaretto if desired. Serve immediately with biscotti on side.

recipes.name: Pasta e Ceci
recipes.instructions: Sauté onions, celery, carrots, garlic in olive oil. Add tomatoes, chickpeas, broth, rosemary, Bay leaf, dried. Simmer 30 minutes. Mash some chickpeas to thicken. Add pasta, cook until done. Season with salt, pepper. Serve with olive oil, parmesan, parsley.

recipes.name: Bistecca alla Fiorentina
recipes.instructions: Bring steak to room temperature. Rub with olive oil, crushed garlic, rosemary. Season generously with coarse salt and cracked black pepper. Grill over very high heat 5-7 minutes per side for rare to medium-rare. Rest 10 minutes. Slice thick, drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Torta Caprese
recipes.instructions: Grind almonds finely. Melt chocolate with butter. Beat eggs with sugar until thick and pale. Fold in melted chocolate, ground almonds, vanilla, amaretto, salt. Pour into greased pan. Bake 180°C for 35 minutes. Center should be slightly soft. Cool completely. Dust with powdered sugar before serving.

recipes.name: Weetabix Original Breakfast
recipes.instructions: Mix Weetabix biscuit in bowl. Pour Candy Up milk over cereal. Top with Kramsi cereal for crunch. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Weetabix Protein Breakfast
recipes.instructions: Mix Weetabix Protein biscuit in bowl. Pour Candy Up milk over cereal. Top with Kramsi cereal for crunch. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Cheese and Jam Sandwich
recipes.instructions: Spread butter on bread slice. Add jam on half of the buttered side. Place cheese slice on the other half. Fold bread in half or serve open-faced.
